top3.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, a.link_to_event
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_date BETWEEN '2019-10-01' AND '2019-11-19';

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, e.event_name, a.link_to_event
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_date >= '2019-10-01' AND e.event_date <= '2019-11-19';

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, a.link_to_event
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_date BETWEEN '2019-10-01' AND '2019-11-19';

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, e.event_name, a.link_to_event
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_date >= '2019-10-01' AND e.event_date <= '2019-11-19';

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, a.link_to_event
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN budget b ON a.link_to_event = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
WHERE e.approved = 1
  AND e.expense_date BETWEEN '2019-01-10' AND '2019-11-19';

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, a.link_to_event
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_date BETWEEN '2019-10-01' AND '2019-11-19';

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, e.event_name, a.link_to_event
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_date >= '2019-10-01' AND e.event_date <= '2019-11-19';

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, a.link_to_event
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN budget b ON a.link_to_event = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
WHERE e.approved = 1
  AND e.expense_date BETWEEN '2019-01-10' AND '2019-11-19';

final.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, a.link_to_event
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_date BETWEEN '2019-10-01' AND '2019-11-19';
